title: Pan Seared Crispy Canadian Lentil Skillet
description: A flexitarian friendly dish featuring fermented Canadian lentils, crispy bhuna and coriander seeds, served in a tagliere vessel, perfect for a monsoon evening.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large tagliere vessel over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, until fragrant.
Add the fermented Canadian lentils, coriander seeds, bhuna masala, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Cook for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the lentils are crispy and golden brown.
Serve the pan seared crispy Canadian lentil skillet hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
Let it rest for a few minutes before serving to allow the flavors to meld together.
